info.title: InternoCore Inventory-Service
info.description: Microservicio Core para Inventario y Kardex

post.description: Processes a POS Sale as a set of inventory OUT movements.

get.description: Lista los registros de auditoría para la empresa actual.
Obtiene el estado actual del inventario con respaldo aduanal. Agrupa por SKU y Pedimento, calculando el saldo residual (available_quantity) y detectando riesgos de vencimiento legal (IMMEX).

schema.description: Buscar por SKU, Producto o Pedimento

get.description: List all current stock levels for the active company.
Generates a preview of the next folio for a given concept.

Recupera los detalles de un documento de inventario por su ID.
En el backend, el document_id es el id/trace_id de los movimientos.

[PHASE 42.5] Picking Suggestion Logic.
Returns the specific batches (Movements) that WILL be consumed by FIFO.
Consulta los niveles de stock (Actual y Reservado) para un producto en un almacén.

post.description:
[Phase 42.8] Internal Relocation.
Executes a stock move between locations within the same warehouse.

Response Search Inventory Products Api V1 Search Products Search Get

get.description:
Returns a lightweight list of all known products/variants for the company.
Used for frontend hydration (Registry Cache).

post.description:
On-Demand Reconciliation: Manually triggers the backflushing logic for a specific error.
Used by warehouse managers after replenishing stock or fixings BOMs.

[Phase 100] High-Performance Bulk Load: Inyecta registros masivos omitiendo lógica de negocio costosa.
Requiere el secreto interno para bypass de Rate Limit y validaciones de dominio.

get.description: [Mobile Support] Returns a detailed list of all stock items with pedimento and expiry info.

post.description:
[Phase 63] Laissez-Faire Reception: Registers stock immediately.
Density Guard validation moved to background.

get.description: Returns aggregated counts for the top dashboard cards.

Returns a paginated & filtered list of inventory documents.
Supports optional date range: date_from / date_to (ISO 8601).

Returns the consolidated view of physical and transit stock.
Accessible by all valid tenant users.

post.description:
[EMERGENCY] Releases stuck reserved_quantity.
Requires OWNER/ADMIN role.

get.description:
Kardex: Running balance for a specific SKU/Warehouse.
Uses SQL Window Function SUM OVER (ORDER BY created_at).

WAC Valuation: Weighted Average Cost snapshot from the immutable Movement ledger.
as_of_date: optional ISO 8601 cutoff for historical valuation.

ABC Rotation: Classifies every SKU by 30-day exit velocity.
- A: rotation_index >= 0.7  (fast-movers)
- B: 0.3 <= index < 0.7
- C: index < 0.3            (slow-movers / dead stock)

Consolidatado de métricas de inventario para el Dashboard de Mission Control.
Integra telemetría de SQL y metadatos de Master Data.

Returns telemetry for ALL warehouses of the company in a single request.
Optimizes frontend performance and reduces request storm.

Check if the company is ready for inventory operations.
Used during onboarding to guide the user.

post.summary: 🔄 Demo Data Reset — Fresh Demo Rule
post.description: Clears and re-seeds active tenant data with timestamps from the last 24 hours. Only available for OWNER/ADMIN roles. Designed to keep the Dashboard always 'alive' in demos and development.

get.description: Verifies that the demo-reset endpoint is active and the user has permissions.

post.description: Crea un documento de tránsito y registra los movimientos de Kardex correspondientes. El stock sale del almacén de Empresa A y entra a un hold lógico de tránsito hasta ser recibido por Empresa B.

Empresa B confirma la recepción del inventario en tránsito. El stock sale del hold de tránsito y entra al almacén físico de Empresa B de forma inmediata. La validación de Density Guard ocurre en Background.
Cancela una transferencia que aún no ha sido recibida por Empresa B. El stock es devuelto al almacén de origen de Empresa A.

post.summary: [Empresa A] Reclamar stock de transferencia huérfana
post.description: Revierte una transferencia SHIPPED que quedó huérfana (Empresa B no la recibió). El stock regresa del almacén de tránsito al almacén de origen de Empresa A. El documento DRAFT en Empresa B es cancelado automáticamente.

get.summary: [Empresa B] Listar transferencias pendientes de recepción
get.description: Retorna todas las transferencias en estado SHIPPED dirigidas a la empresa del usuario autenticado. Permite a Empresa B gestionar sus recepciones pendientes.
Retorna el historial de transferencias inter-company generadas por la empresa del usuario autenticado.
Retorna el detalle completo de una transferencia. Accesible por ambas empresas involucradas (A y B).
Permite recuperar el detalle de una transferencia usando su número de folio. Ideal para ser consumido por dispositivos handheld o scanners durante la recepción.

get.summary: [P0] Real-time Density Guard for a specific location
get.description:
[Phase 83 — P0 Bug Fix]
Returns real-time occupancy, capacity, and density semaphore for a location.

This endpoint was referenced by the PutAway Handheld Component (Step 2) but
was never implemented — causing a silent failure in the frontend density check.

Response contract matches exactly what `getLocationDensity()` in inventory.service.ts expects.

get.summary: Queue of IN movements pending physical placement
get.description:
[Phase 83] Returns the queue of inventory movements that have been received
(movement_type=IN) but not yet assigned to a physical rack location
(location IS NULL or location = 'SYS_RECEIVING').

Sorted by FIFO (oldest first) to prioritize aged stock.
Enriched with pedimento_number and days_in_dock for the UI Age Indicator.

get.summary: List all locations with real-time density semaphore
get.description:
[Phase 83] Returns all registered locations for a warehouse with their
real-time density semaphore (uses the denormalized current_units cache for O(1) speed).

parameters.name: zone_type

schema.description: Filter by zone: RECEIVING, STORAGE, PICKING…
schema.title: Zone Type

parameters.description: Filter by zone: RECEIVING, STORAGE, PICKING…

post.summary: [Dev/Demo] Seed warehouse locations with industrial layout
post.description:
[Phase 83] Seeds the warehouse with a realistic industrial location layout:
- 3 Virtual system zones (SYS_RECEIVING, SYS_TRANSIT, SYS_QUALITY)
- Aisle 01: 3 sections × 4 levels × 2 bins = 24 STORAGE slots
- Aisle 02: 6 PICKING positions (velocity A)
Idempotent: skips existing locations.

get.description:
Returns an inventory document with point-in-time prices for historical reprinting.
Prices are resolved at the moment the document was created (soft-close query).

destination_company_id.title: Destination Company Id
destination_company_id.description: Company ID de la empresa DESTINO (Empresa B)

destination_warehouse_id.title: Destination Warehouse Id
destination_warehouse_id.description: Almacén de destino en Empresa B

origin_warehouse_id.title: Origin Warehouse Id
origin_warehouse_id.description: Almacén de origen en Empresa A

product_id.title: Product Id
product_id.description: product_id del catálogo de Empresa A

destination_product_id.title: Destination Product Id
destination_product_id.description: product_id equivalente en catálogo de Empresa B

currency.title: Currency
currency.description: Moneda del acuerdo comercial (USD, MXN, etc)

transfer_price.title: Transfer Price
transfer_price.description: Precio de venta de Empresa A = Costo de compra de Empresa B. Si no se provee, se usará el WAC de A como fallback (precio sin margen) y la respuesta incluirá un 'transfer_price_warning'.

exchange_rate_dof.title: Exchange Rate Dof
exchange_rate_dof.description: Tasa de cambio oficial para conversión binacional (MXN/USD)

risk_acknowledged.title: Risk Acknowledged
risk_acknowledged.description: True si el usuario aceptó explícitamente el riesgo de despacho (ej. pedimento por vencer)

InitiateTransferRequest.title: InitiateTransferRequest
InitiateTransferRequest.description: Body del endpoint de inicio de transferencia inter-company.

quantity_change.title: Quantity Change
quantity_change.description: Amount to add (positive) or remove (negative, handled by logic usually positive magnitude with OUT type)

weight.title: Weight
weight.description: Total weight of this item in movement

unit_cost.title: Unit Cost
unit_cost.description: Cost of the unit for CPP calculation (only for IN)

KardexRowEntity.title: KardexRowEntity
KardexRowEntity.description: Running balance row for a single SKU in a warehouse (Kardex).

received_quantity.title: Received Quantity
received_quantity.description: Si None, se asume recepción total de la cantidad despachada

damaged_quantity.title: Damaged Quantity
damaged_quantity.description: Cantidad reportada como dañada (ajuste automático por merma)

destination_location.title: Destination Location
destination_location.description: Ubicación física final en el almacén de destino.

ReceiveTransferRequest.title: ReceiveTransferRequest
ReceiveTransferRequest.description: Body del endpoint de recepción de transferencia.
